title: marina calycosa
intro: Marina calycosa, also known as Mexican calyso, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Marina calycosa has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Marina calycosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
